notes: Live-captured top-level Event read against harry-test-heelo.myshopify.com. The dedicated Events capture script discovers a real event ID from events(first: 1, sortKey: ID, reverse: true), then records event(id:), a non-empty events connection, and eventsCount without a query filter. This scenario proves top-level Events reads must return the real Shopify event set instead of falling back to the snapshot no-data serializer for stores with events.
